title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 506.080 - Court deemed always open for filing certain papers
text:
506.080.  Court deemed always open for filing certain papers. — The courts shall be deemed always open for the purpose of filing any pleading or other proper paper, of issuing and returning mesne and final process, and of making and directing all interlocutory motions, orders and rules.
(L. 1943 p. 353 § 7)
